sessions.summary: TrinityDatasetPlugin moved to TQUANTA2. dataset_builder.py + lora_trainer.py + model_merger.py built — full LoRA pipeline complete in code. Mistral-7B HF weights on TQUANTA2. TrinityDataset_env live. MacBook M5 MPS path confirmed. ETHICA_TOOL_APPENDIX updated — 37 modules / 143 tools. 5 commits. Master 7427e23. Vault 167 files.

XTTS v2 voice system built and tested — Trinity spoke through Ethica. Dormant until RTX 5090 (72% RAM on CPU). pyttsx3 restored. start_ethica.sh committed. .progress docs/ untracked from git. 3 commits. Master at 28c6350. Vault 165 files.

Stability pass. canvas_history healed (496MB wipe + guards). Gage on OllamaConnector. Tool/chat bleed fixed. KEYWORD_GROUPS casing corrected. anomaly_worker sys.path fixed. Surgical method in Claude memory. 7 commits. Master at 9e3a5d8. Vault 165 files clean.

Canvas archive built. fm_zip/unzip/zip_status wired to FileManager. Both drop zones routing correctly — chat zone to Ops, canvas zone to notify_fn. .zip in SUPPORTED_EXTENSIONS. Keyword router wired. 5 commits. Master at 8993262. Vault 165 files clean.
Nyxt browser agent scaffolded. 7 tools wired. Three-registration rule satisfied. Nyxt 4.0.0 AppImage installed. Threading fix, xdg-open, software_render, _clean_sockets. Commit baf622b.
